utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each of them includes detailed specifications such as provider, type, coverage_features, and explicit costs (monthly and annual), fulfilling the requirement that each item be fully specified. Therefore, all items requested in the format are fully covered with the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected four LifeFirst coverages: (1) Comprehensive health (physical + mental), (2) Comprehensive property & business equipment protection, (3) Business + adventure travel insurance, and (4) Professional liability + accident protection. From the ground-truth data: for health coverage, LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 9 for physical and rating 4 for mental, so combined comprehensive health coverage can be represented by both ratings 9 and 4. For property coverage, the closest match is LifeFirst Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content with rating 9. For travel coverage, LifeFirst Standard Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 9. For additional services (professional liability + accident protection), there’s no direct match in the ground-truth dataset, so no rating is available.
